title: TokenEstimate
description: Token estimate for an active session (MCP `estimate_tokens` response).

context_window.description: Context window size for the detected model.

growth_rate.description: Growth rate metrics. Absent when fewer than 5 assistant turns exist.

output_tokens.description: Output tokens from the last turn.

ContextHealth.description: Context health assessment based on utilization percentage.

oneOf.description: Utilization is near or at the context window limit.

GrowthRate.description:
Growth rate metrics for a session's context usage.

Computed from non-sidechain assistant turns with usage data.
Only available when 5 or more qualifying turns exist.

avg_tokens_per_turn.description: Average context tokens added per assistant turn.

estimated_turns_remaining.description: Estimated assistant turns remaining before context window is full.

turn_count.description: Number of assistant turns used to compute these metrics.
